signup_subtitle: Create your account and start your journey with Sahifaty
password_helper: Min 8 chars — uppercase, lowercase, number, and symbol
categorized_verses_msg:
@percentage% 
 of verses categorized in your Sahifa
basmalah: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful
welcome_msg: Start with a short kickoff assessment so we can build a more useful Sahifa from day one.
welcome_kickoff_badge: A guided kickoff, not a placeholder screen
welcome_kickoff_title: Start with a short assessment that builds your Sahifa on real signal
welcome_kickoff_subtitle: This is not a decorative step. It gives Sahifaty a first reading of your memorization and comprehension so your starting point feels earned, not generic.
welcome_kickoff_value_1_body: A few minutes are enough to capture a practical first picture before you continue.
welcome_kickoff_value_2_body: Its result shapes the first progress view and early recommendations around your real level.
welcome_kickoff_value_3_body: You may enter the Sahifa now and come back later, but the experience becomes more useful if you start here.
welcome_kickoff_step_1_body: We prepare the quick-questions school first, then take you straight into the opening assessment.
welcome_kickoff_step_2_body: After that, your Sahifa starts from a more truthful point instead of a generic default state.
welcome_kickoff_step_3_body: From there you can keep reading, review your Sahifa, and return to deeper assessment later.
welcome_chart_subtitle: We only show it when real evaluation data exists, not as a grey placeholder that looks like progress.
welcome_chart_loading_body: We are checking whether there is any real signal worth showing on this screen yet.
welcome_chart_empty_body: Once you finish the kickoff assessment, this area will show your first truthful summary instead of invented percentages or a misleading chart.
welcome_chart_error_title: We could not load the snapshot right now
welcome_chart_error_body: You can retry, or start the assessment now and let the chart appear after real data exists.
welcome_chart_total_count: @count verses included in the current summary
welcome_dimension_hint: Switch between memorization and comprehension only when there is real data to compare.
welcome_cta_title: What would you like to do now?
welcome_cta_body: The recommended path is to start the kickoff assessment now so the Sahifa becomes useful immediately.
welcome_primary_cta_caption: Expected time: about 3 minutes. We will take you straight into the opening questions.
welcome_secondary_cta_caption: If you prefer to explore first, you can enter now and return to the assessment later from inside your journey.
welcome_kickoff_error_missing_user: This step cannot start until the current session is restored correctly.
welcome_kickoff_generic_error: We could not prepare this step right now. Please try again in a moment.
generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
you_are_at_first_level: You are at the first level
no_verses_for_surah_in_juz: No verses for this Surah in this Juz
delete_account_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
delete_account_error: An error occurred while deleting the account
settings_email_client_error: Could not open the email client
settings_location_lookup_load_error: Could not load the country and city data: @error
settings_country_list_load_error: Could not load the country list
settings_validation_no_cities: No cities are available for this country in the current source
settings_profile_location_source_error: Could not load the current country and city source. Try reopening this screen.
settings_profile_section_subtitle: Update your personal details and save them directly to your profile.
settings_profile_country_code_helper: Derived automatically from the selected country phone code in the same local source
settings_profile_country_code_auto: Filled automatically from the selected country
settings_profile_city_helper_pick_countr: Choose a country first to see the available cities
settings_profile_city_helper_canonical: City is the canonical field instead of state in this flow
settings_profile_canonical_note: Stored values remain canonical to support later translation: @education / @work
main_screen_resume_body: Your last saved reading context was in Surah @surah through the @path path. You can return directly to the same reading position instead of starting over.
main_screen_chart_empty: There is not enough assessed reading data to show a chart here yet, so this screen stays focused on getting you into reading first.
main_screen_chart_intro_first: You are here to enter reading directly. Once real assessments accumulate, the charts return as support, not as a substitute for reading.
main_screen_hizb_loading_body: We load the surahs inside each hizb before opening this path so you do not land on a card without a valid reading entry.
main_screen_hizb_error_title: We could not prepare the hizb path
content_item_card_recommendation_delete_: Unable to delete the recommendation right now.
content_item_card_support_ayah_range: This slice is reviewed verse by verse so the result stays accurate.
content_item_card_support_juz: You can rate the full juz or drill into individual surahs and verses.
content_item_card_support_default: Choose one rating for the whole unit or review each verse in detail.
content_item_card_status_pending: This unit is still waiting for assessment
content_item_card_action_rate_unit_title: Rate the full unit at once
content_item_card_action_rate_unit_subti: Choose one rating to apply across every verse in this unit.
content_item_card_action_review_verses_s: Open the individual verses when you need a more precise review.
content_item_card_action_start_verses_su: This content type does not support a single unit-wide rating.
content_item_card_juz_hint: Tap the card itself to open the surahs inside this juz.
assessment_dialog_no_values: No assessment values are configured for the current environment, so a new evaluation cannot be saved from this dialog yet.
assessment_dialog_memorization_unavailab: Memorization options are not available in the current taxonomy, so this dialog will save comprehension only.
assessment_dialog_comprehension_unavaila: Comprehension options are not available in the current taxonomy, so this dialog will save memorization only.
assessment_dialog_hint: Tap the same value again to clear it. No changes are saved until you confirm.
pending_sync_title: Saved assessments are waiting to sync
pending_sync_body_single: One assessment is saved on this device and will be sent automatically when the connection returns.
pending_sync_body_plural: @count assessments are saved on this device and will be sent automatically when the connection returns.
feedback: You can send a feedback by contacting
privacy_policy_intro: Welcome to "Sahifati." We place the highest importance on your data privacy and the security of your personal information. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect the information you provide when using our website and mobile application.
privacy_policy_section_1_a_content:
When registering with "Sahifati," we collect the following information to personalize your experience and improve the recommendation engine:

Credentials: Username, encrypted password, or login data via (Google/iPhone/Facebook).
Personal Information: Name, gender, year of birth.
Geographic Information: Country and state/province.
Educational Information: Education level and field of specialization.
privacy_policy_section_1_b_content:
Memorization Record: Verses you have evaluated (mastered, for review, etc.).
Content Interests: Topics you interact with to enhance the recommendation engine.
privacy_policy_section_1_c_content:
Purchases: License purchase history (without directly storing credit card details, as payments are processed through trusted payment providers).
Activation Codes: Record of generated promo codes or those received through the "Gift" system.
privacy_policy_section_2_content:
We use the data we collect for the following purposes:

Service Activation: Verifying license validity and account status.
Recommendation Engine: Providing personalized memorization recommendations based on your education level, specialization, and verse mastery rate.
Content Management: Enabling the three-tier review system (Editor, Supervisor, Approver) to ensure accurate indexing of Qur’anic topics.
Gift System: Managing the distribution of free and owned usage licenses.
Communication: Sending notifications about the status of your submissions or important app updates.
privacy_policy_section_3_content:
We do not sell or rent your personal data to third parties.
Public Data: Some information (such as username and index contributions) may be visible to supervisors and approvers as part of the review workflow.
Institutions: If you are affiliated with a center or organization using "Institutional Services," the center administrator may be able to view your memorization progress reports.
privacy_policy_section_4_content:
We are committed to protecting your data by:

Encrypting passwords using advanced algorithms (such as PBKDF2).
Using secure communication protocols (HTTPS) for data transmission.
Performing regular backups to ensure your memorization and evaluation records are not lost.
privacy_policy_section_5_content:
You have the right to:

Access and edit your profile data at any time.
Request permanent deletion of your account.
Opt out of receiving marketing messages.
privacy_policy_section_6_content: We may update this policy from time to time to reflect changes in the app or applicable laws. You will be notified of any material changes via email or through an in-app notification.
privacy_policy_section_7_content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us via the technical support email within the app:
social_auth_subtitle: Use a trusted account to sign in or create your account faster.
social_google_requires_client_id: Set GOOGLE_WEB_CLIENT_ID to enable Google Sign-In on web.
social_google_requires_mobile_config: Google Sign-In is not enabled on this device until GOOGLE_SERVER_CLIENT_ID is provided and Android OAuth is configured in Google Cloud for the app package and signing fingerprints.
social_google_mobile_interrupted: Google sign-in stopped before completion on this device. If you did not cancel it yourself, verify the Android OAuth setup in Google Cloud, especially the package name, SHA-1/SHA-256 fingerprints, and the correct Google client.
social_facebook_requires_app_id: Set FACEBOOK_APP_ID to enable Facebook Login on web.
social_provider_temporarily_unavailable: @provider is not available on this device right now.
social_account_exists_with_password: An account with this email already exists. Sign in with your password first.
social_account_exists_with_different_pro: This email is linked to a different sign-in method. Continue with @provider.
social_missing_id_token: Could not retrieve the token required to finish social sign-in.
social_cancelled: The sign-in flow was cancelled before completion.
social_google_card_subtitle: Use a trusted Google account to continue quickly.
social_facebook_card_subtitle: Continue with the Facebook account you already use.
auth_login_subtitle_compact: A calmer, faster surface that gets you into your account without visual noise.
auth_account_selector_subtitle: Saved accounts on this device are now part of the sign-in experience. Continue instantly with a stored account or switch to manual sign-in when you need another email.
auth_saved_accounts_caption: If a session is still valid you can continue immediately. Otherwise the app will only ask for the password again.
auth_saved_accounts_empty_body: Start with manual sign-in or create a new account. After the first saved session, it will appear here for faster access next time.
auth_signup_subtitle_compact: A lighter, clearer surface that keeps sign-up and quick continuation in one place.
